scripts.setup: npm install && (command -v python3.13 >/dev/null && python3.13 -m venv apps/api/.venv || python3 -m venv apps/api/.venv) && . apps/api/.venv/bin/activate && pip install -r apps/api/requirements.txt
scripts.dev:pipecat: (test -d apps/pipecat/.venv || python3 -m venv apps/pipecat/.venv) && . apps/pipecat/.venv/bin/activate && pip install -q -r apps/pipecat/requirements.txt && uvicorn server:app --app-dir apps/pipecat --host 0.0.0.0 --port ${PIPECAT_PORT:-8110}
scripts.build:web: rm -rf apps/web/.next && npm --workspace apps/web run build
scripts.start:web: rm -rf apps/web/.next && npm --workspace apps/web run build && npm --workspace apps/web run start
